title:
Data practice communities
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Data practice communities
- Open data community forums Open data discussion forums, websites and meetups where you can get (and share) information and ideas about the innovative use of open data.

### Open data community forums
Open data discussion forums, websites and meetups where you can get (and share) information and ideas about the innovative use of open data.
- Algorithm charter community of practice A community of practice for government people to learn, share ideas and advice, collaborate, and align good algorithm use practice across government. CoP terms of reference The initial terms of reference for the New Zealand Government-Te Kāwanatanga o Aotearoa Algorithm Charter Community of Practice outlines the purpose, role, and membership of the CoP in its establishment phase.

### Algorithm charter community of practice
A community of practice for government people to learn, share ideas and advice, collaborate, and align good algorithm use practice across government.
- CoP terms of reference The initial terms of reference for the New Zealand Government-Te Kāwanatanga o Aotearoa Algorithm Charter Community of Practice outlines the purpose, role, and membership of the CoP in its establishment phase.

#### CoP terms of reference
The initial terms of reference for the New Zealand Government-Te Kāwanatanga o Aotearoa Algorithm Charter Community of Practice outlines the purpose, role, and membership of the CoP in its establishment phase.
